name: Basic Puff Pastry
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 1:00
1. Cut the butter into the flour with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Sprinkle cold water (1 tablespoon at a time) evenly over the surface; stir with a fork until the dry ingredients are moistened.
3. Shape into a ball, and wrap in waxed paper. Chill for 15 minutes.
4. Combine the softened butter and flour; stir until smooth. Shape into a square on waxed paper. Chill for 5 minutes.
5. Roll the pastry into a 15-inch circle on a lightly floured surface. Place the chilled butter mixture in the center of the pastry.
6. Fold the left side of the pastry over the butter, then fold the right side of the pastry over the left.
7. Fold the upper and lower edges of the pastry over the butter, forming a thick square.
8. Working quickly, place the dough, folded side down, on a lightly floured surface; roll the dough into a 20- x 8-inch rectangle.
9. Fold the rectangle into thirds, beginning with the short side.
10. Roll the pastry into another 20- x 8-inch rectangle, then fold it into thirds again.
11. Wrap the dough in wax paper and chill for about 2 hours.
12. Repeat the rolling, folding, and chilling process two additional times.
13. Chill for an additional 2 hours.
Yield: one Basic Puff Pastry
